attacking_style: Not a primary attacker; operates as elite leadout specialist with precise positioning in final kilometer. Early breakaway attempts appear opportunistic rather than strategic strength.
team_tactics: Executes high-value leadout organization for designated sprinter (DÉMARE) in final 1km, maintaining composure when rival trains disorganized. Provides tactical positioning control rather than raw pace-setting.
terrain_preference: Flat sprint finishes where leadout precision matters most. Compromised on climbs where early breakaway role suggests misallocation of classics/flat specialist skillset.
vulnerability: Climbs expose limitations when forced into breakaway duty rather than sprint support role. Tactical choices questionable when crosswind opportunities neutralized.
key_patterns: Replicated high-value 1km leadout positioning across Grand Tours (Tour, Giro) for DÉMARE
Neutralizes rival sprint launches through precise final kilometer organization, not raw power
Early breakaway attempts on climbs indicate tactical compromise when primary sprint role unavailable
form_trajectory: neutral: 2020 shows refined leadout execution, but limited recent data and narrow specialist role prevents clear trajectory assessment
